description:
Migrate and modernize the vex-chat/spire server (github.com/vex-chat/spire) into apps/spire within this pnpm monorepo.

Source: github.com/vex-chat/spire (0.8.0, ~4000 lines TypeScript)
Target: apps/spire (currently just a scaffold with a hello-world Express server)

Key modernizations required:
- CommonJS → ESM (workspace already uses 'type: module')
- TypeScript 4.1 → 5.x (inherits root tsconfig with nodenext/esnext/strict)
- express@4 + express-ws → express@5 + ws (or keep express-ws if compatible)
- jest@26 + ts-jest → vitest
- tslint (deprecated) → ESLint + typescript-eslint
- msgpack-lite (unmaintained) → @msgpack/msgpack
- uuid@8 → crypto.randomUUID() (native)
- file-type@16 (CJS) → file-type@19+ (ESM)
- knex@0.21 → knex@3 (current)
- yarn → pnpm (already done)
- Node 14 target → Node 20+ LTS

Architecture to migrate (5 core modules, 4 route files, 3 utils, 8 migrations, 1 test file):
- Spire.ts (529 lines) - main server class, extends EventEmitter
- ClientManager.ts (435 lines) - WebSocket connection manager
- Database.ts (849 lines) - data access layer (MySQL + SQLite3)
- server/index.ts (797 lines) - HTTP API routes
- server/avatar.ts, file.ts, invite.ts, user.ts - sub-route handlers
- server/utils.ts - censorUser helper
- utils/ - createLogger, createUint8UUID, loadEnv
- migrations/ - 8 Knex migration files (users, mail, preKeys, oneTimeKeys, servers, channels, permissions, files)
- __tests__/Database.spec.ts - database tests
title: [EPIC] Migrate vex-chat/spire to apps/spire monorepo package
